pattern_B.description: Linear EMA on circular quantity replaced with circularChromaHueSmoothed

pattern_C.description: Raw argmax bin selection replaced with circular weighted mean

pattern_D.description: Experimental Audio Pack with Schmitt trigger hysteresis and dominantNoteFromBins

additional_chromautils_users.description: Effects using ChromaUtils not classified as A/B/C/D (Section 5.6)

gaps.description: Beat Pulse (Shockwave In) removed. Metadata position preserved but no class registered. Code comment says slot left empty for ID stability, but the code does not actually skip the total counter, causing a -1 offset in registered IDs for effects 112+ vs their PATTERN_METADATA positions.
gaps.affects: All effect IDs >= 112 may have a -1 offset between code registration (total counter) and PATTERN_METADATA array position. This means registered ID in RendererActor may not match the metadata lookup index.

gaps.context: CHROMA_ARGMAX_FIX_SPEC Section 5.3 lists Chevron Waves as ID 18, but PATTERN_METADATA position 18 is LGP Diamond Lattice. Chevron Waves is at metadata position 22.
gaps.note: Spec document has incorrect ID for Chevron Waves. Actual ID from PatternRegistry is 22.

gaps.context: PATTERN_METADATA position 98 = 'Audio Bloom Parity' but CoreEffects registers SnapwaveLinearEffect at code total 98. Position 99 = 'Audio Waveform Parity' but CoreEffects registers TrinityTestEffect at code total 99.
gaps.note: Display names in PatternRegistry at positions 98-99 do not match the actual class implementations registered at those code positions. SnapwaveLinearEffect (linear, not centre-origin) is registered where 'Audio Bloom Parity' metadata sits.
